name: conductor
description: Conductor is a Codex plugin that allows you to specify, plan, and implement software features.

interface.shortDescription: Conductor is a Codex plugin that allows you to specify, plan, and implement software features.
interface.longDescription: Conductor is a Codex plugin that enables Context-Driven Development. It turns the Codex into a proactive project manager that follows a strict protocol to specify, plan, and implement software features and bug fixes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Starts a new feature or bug track
